title: Simple Teleport
description: Makes it easier to teleport with TP points to save
body:
Simple way to teleport yourself with a save function where you can save specific points to teleport to.

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_34b9ec90-1add-474e-90a2-83dbf72ddac3.png) 
The Save interfase. with load you teleport yuorself to the point you save

![image](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1138903/description_2942c116-74f8-480d-baef-2933d9d920c7.png) 
The Teleport interfase.
